inputs.label: Dry Bulb Temperature
inputs.businessContext: The ambient air temperature measured by a standard thermometer.

businessContext_i18n.en: The ambient air temperature measured by a standard thermometer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart bir termometre ile ölçülen ortam hava sıcaklığı.

inputs.label: Wet Bulb Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature measured by a wet-bulb thermometer, indicating evaporative cooling capacity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature measured by a wet-bulb thermometer, indicating evaporative cooling capacity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaş termometre ile ölçülen, buharlaşmalı soğutma kapasitesini gösteren sıcaklık.

inputs.label: Atmospheric Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Barometric pressure at the measurement location, required for psychrometric calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Barometric pressure at the measurement location, required for psychrometric calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm konumundaki barometrik basınç, psikrometrik hesaplama için gereklidir.

inputs.label: Psychrometric Constant
inputs.businessContext: Empirical constant depending on ventilation type; 0.00066 for aspirated, 0.0008 for sling psychrometer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Empirical constant depending on ventilation type; 0.00066 for aspirated, 0.0008 for sling psychrometer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Havalandırma tipine bağlı ampirik sabit; aspire edilen için 0,00066, sapan psikrometre için 0,0008.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
